steps.title: Add primitive command foundation
steps.what_changed: Shared command-backed primitive foundation, tool-kind helpers, spill-to-file behavior, and fake sandbox alignment with the Session contract.
steps.review_instructions: Verify the shared helper handles timeouts, spill-to-file, structured output shaping, and per-tool exit-code classification. Confirm tool-kind gating matches the locked taxonomy and that fake sandbox exec behavior no longer embeds AllowShell policy.

steps.title: Add file search primitives
steps.what_changed: Implemented search_files and search_text with structured inputs, file-tool gating, and ripgrep no-match handling.
steps.review_instructions: Check that both tools are visible only when the file tool kind is allowed, that search_text treats ripgrep exit code 1 as an empty success, and that large search payloads follow the shared spill-to-file contract.

steps.title: Add query_json primitive
steps.what_changed: Implemented query_json for file-path and inline JSON input, with jq-backed evaluation and optional output-file writes.
steps.review_instructions: Verify query_json is data-tool gated, requires exactly one input source, turns jq failures into tool errors, and returns structured parsed output or output-file metadata.

steps.title: Add http_request primitive
steps.what_changed: Implemented http_request as a network primitive with allowlist threading, structured response metadata, download support, and private-target blocking.
steps.review_instructions: Confirm the tool is hidden unless the network tool kind is allowed, denied unless AllowNetwork is true, honors timeout and size limits, writes output_path downloads correctly, and blocks loopback, link-local, and private targets unless allowlisted.

steps.title: Add build-oriented primitives
steps.what_changed: Implemented run_tests and build with command override support, small auto-detection coverage, and structured execution results.
steps.review_instructions: Check that run_tests and build are gated by the build tool kind, detect commands from package.json, go.mod, Cargo.toml, pyproject.toml, and Makefile, and return structured execution results without requiring raw exec visibility.

steps.title: Add query_sql primitive
steps.what_changed: Implemented query_sql with a generic engine parameter, SQLite day-1 support, optional output-file writes, and explicit unsupported-engine tool errors for non-SQLite engines.
steps.review_instructions: Verify query_sql is visible only under the data tool kind, works for SQLite queries, returns structured tool errors for unsupported engines or SQL failures, and follows the shared output contract.
